solutions.solution: Arithmetical operations: The first step is to obtain by squaring the number 2, the second step is obtained by doubling it, the 3rd step is obtained by squaring the numbers of step I, 4th step is obtained from the numbers of 2nd step and then doubling it.

Miscellaneous: In first step, all the vowels are repeated twice. In second step, letters are written in reverse fashion. In third step, all the letters in the 1st position of each word are replaced by the next letter of the alphabet (t becomes u, a becomes b... etc.) and in the last step, the last letter of each word is preceded by the word.
